title: ferray-core: no safe casting functions (can_cast, astype equivalent)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy provides np.can_cast(from, to, casting='safe') and arr.astype(dtype) for explicit type casting with safety levels: 'no', 'equiv', 'safe', 'same_kind', 'unsafe'. ferray-core has dtype/casting.rs and dtype/promotion.rs for type promotion rules, but no public API to actually cast an array from one dtype to another. map_to() exists for typed closures but there's no astype(DType) on DynArray or a safe_cast<U>() on Array<T,D>. This is essential for: loading data as one type and converting to another, matching dtypes before operations, implementing NumPy-compatible casting semantics.
